raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-commitment statements functioning as therapeutic reminders or mantras to prioritize internal connection and boundary maintenance",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "self-connection is a choosable and maintainable state",
    "prioritizing self-connection improves emotional regulation and prevents self-abandonment",
    "people-pleasing often involves temporarily disconnecting from one's own experience",
    "breath awareness is an effective tool for remaining present during distress"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a unified set of related intentions reinforcing the same core priority without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the user experiences boundary erosion or self-neglect in relationships, responds well to repetitive self-statements, and applies the principles alongside contextual judgment rather than rigid literalism",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements are interpreted as endorsing emotional isolation, chronic self-focus at the expense of mutual care, or used to justify avoidance of necessary relational repair"
}
